title: The New Fish-Man Pirates Intimidate the Island
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Pappag, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates, King Neptune. The core story beat is the new fish-man pirates intimidate the island.
scene: The scene centers on the new fish-man pirates intimidate the island, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Pappag, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Hody Jones, New Fish-Man Pirates, King Neptune driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We have arrived!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Welcome home, Master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is my house!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's Huuuge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Really?! is it really him?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ohohohohohohohohohoho!!! Did I give you a shock?! I may just be a stylish star- fish up in the world above...

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: But here on Fish-Man Island, I'm mega- celebrity designer pappage, president of the Criminal Brand Company!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, look!! What's that over there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our stores can be found in countries around the entire world!! Why, even Dosk01 Panda...

dialogue.speaker: Pappag
dialogue.text: The first floor is a criminal brand store! Looks like someone's making a scene there, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now listen here!! Why is everything in this shop so ridiculously expensive?! I mean, sure, the clothes are cute, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A customer making a complaint...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll pay 10,000 and not a bell more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, Madam, be reasonable!! That's under half the original price!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey!! Nami!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: so she's the difficult & customer, huh...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahh! It's nam-chin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm...? Luffy...! and AHHHH!!! CAMIIE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!! Monsieur papag!! Wonderful timing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We seem to have a slight... problem, you see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I hear this is your shop, right? Well, what do you call these prices?! It's practically theft!

dialogue.speaker: Pappag
dialogue.text: Well, you know... it's a luxury designer brand... I'm a famous designer, so -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Monsi- EUR!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bring them down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, come off it...

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Look, forget about the prices! I owe you guys big for what happened two years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can take whatever you like, free of charge!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For nothing?! really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wasn't that nice of him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Monsieur Popping, the store is empty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haven't you heard of restraint?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's this?! There seems to be some kind of commotion outside the store...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's him!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Monsieur Pappage!! It's terrible!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's wrong?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Some- thing's happye- ning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's not an explain- nation!! What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: W... well, just look!! up in the sky above...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He has travelled here from the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "A whale?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But... why would he visit these lowly waters?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I.... I've never seen him in person before....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's going on?! He's all on his own... no army or anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is there a matter of national urgency...?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Don't tell me the island has been invaded by a mighty pirate...?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Is the island going to become a warzone?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This can't be happening!! It must be something terrible!! Everyone evacuate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hoho hoho...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RULER OF THE RYUGUKINGDOWN SEA-GOD NEPIUNE (A COCAGANTH MERMAN)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Neptuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HOBEEEEE EEEEE EEEELL!!!

summary: The New Fish-Man Pirates Intimidate the Island. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
